Thank you

Thank you. Your quote request has been sent.

We received your request and will review the details provided for your camera, access control, intercom, WiFi, cabling, fiber, or network project.

Back to homeView services

Thank you

What happens next

Our team reviews the project scope, property type, and timeline before following up by email or phone.

  • Review the systems, services, and building details you submitted.
  • Confirm scope, timing, and any site-visit requirements.
  • Follow up with the next step for pricing, planning, or coordination.

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
